name: HRC_SEM_INTERNAL_JOBS
description: This table contains the internal job posting.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the primary key of the table.

columns.Name: URI
columns.Comments: This column contains the URI of the internal job.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition ID.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition number.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TITLE
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition title.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains job family name.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains job function name.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the organization name.

columns.Name: HIRING_MANAGER_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the hiring manager name.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the recruiter name.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the recruiter id.

columns.Name: HIRING_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the hiring manager id.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains organization id.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the job family id.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the job function id.

columns.Name: POSTED_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the posted job id.

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition short description.

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column contains the requisition long description.

columns.Name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the short description clob.

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION_CLOB
columns.Comments: This column contains the long description clob.

columns.Name: POSTING_DATE
columns.Comments: This column contains the job posting date.

columns.Name: JOB_SHIFT
columns.Comments: This column contains the job shift.

columns.Name: FULL_OR_PART_TIME
columns.Comments: This column indicates the job is full or part time.

columns.Name: TRAVEL_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This column indicates if this job requires travel.

columns.Name: POSTING_INTERNAL_ONLY
columns.Comments: This column indicates if the job is posted internally only.

columns.Name: LOCATION_COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the location country id.

columns.Name: LOCATION_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains geography ID of state.

columns.Name: LOCATION_CITY_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains geography id of city.

columns.Name: LOCATION_FQN
columns.Comments: This column contains fully qualified name of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LATITUDE
columns.Comments: This contains the latitude of the location.

columns.Name: LOCATION_LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: This column contains the longitude of the location.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the status of the job.

columns.Name: IS_ERROR
columns.Comments: This column indicates if there is an error for indexing.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column contains the error message for the indexing event.

columns.Name: INDEXING_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the indexing event id.

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the batch id.

columns.Name: EDUCATION_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Education Level code

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Job type Lookup code

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DATE
columns.Comments: This column is the Job Expiry Date

columns.Name: MANAGEMENT_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Management Level Lookup code

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is the Recruiting Type Lookup code

columns.Name: JOB_GRADE_CODE
columns.Comments: This column is the job grade code

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
